name: Invoice Ninja API
what_it_does: Open-source invoicing and billing platform with REST API — managing clients, invoices, payments, expenses, projects, and recurring billing for freelancers and small businesses, with self-hosted or cloud deployment and multi-currency support.
use_cases: Creating and sending invoices programmatically to clients via REST API
Managing recurring billing subscriptions and automatic invoice generation
Tracking payments and expenses via API for financial reporting integration
Self-hosted invoicing for agencies with full data ownership and custom branding
Integrating Invoice Ninja with time-tracking tools via API for billable hours
not_for: Enterprise ERP with complex accounting (use NetSuite or Sage)
eCommerce billing with complex tax rules (use Stripe Billing or Chargebee)
Teams needing full double-entry accounting (use Odoo or ERPNext)
best_when: A freelancer, agency, or small business needs open-source self-hosted invoicing with a REST API for automation and integration with other tools.
avoid_when: You need full accounting (chart of accounts, double-entry), complex tax compliance, or enterprise ERP features.

auth.notes: API token per user account. X-API-Token header. Self-hosted: token management in admin panel. User-specific token scoped to account. No OAuth2 — token only. Company ID required in some endpoints.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Self-hosted: completely free (CCPL license); Cloud free plan limited
pricing.paid_tiers: Ninja Pro from $10/month; Enterprise from $14/month; self-hosted: free
pricing.notes: Client Centric Public License — free for self-hosted. Cloud has generous free tier (20 clients). US-based, bootstrapped. 15+ year history. v5 is a complete rewrite in Laravel. Strong freelancer and agency community. Self-hosted Docker deployment available.

performance.rate_limits: No rate limits on self-hosted; cloud has limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers clients, invoices, payments, expenses, projects, and tasks. OpenAPI spec available. Webhook support for invoice and payment events. Self-hosted gives full API control. Some v5 API gaps vs v4 — check feature availability.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Invoice creation creates new records — not idempotent. Client creation idempotent by email. Payment application idempotent for same invoice+amount. Resource reads always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: v5 (Laravel) is a significant rewrite from v4 — check API documentation matches your version
Self-hosted requires PHP, MySQL, and Redis — moderate setup complexity
Company ID context sometimes required in multi-company setups
License (CCPL) restricts commercial hosting — self-host or use official cloud

security_score_components.security_notes: Open source — auditable PHP codebase. GDPR compliant. Self-hosted gives full data control. TLS configurable (not enforced on self-hosted by default). API token auth. No formal certifications. 15+ year-old codebase with active maintenance.
